summary:
Based on the available medical evidence, AZD9668 is not mentioned among listed clinically validated drugs or their associated trial histories. Thus, according to the provided content, there is no indication that AZD9668 has undergone clinical trial evaluation.

The summary should reflect only direct inference from the input material without external assumptions.

Based on the provided medical evidence, AZD9668 is not mentioned among known drugs with documented clinical trial data. Consequently, within the scope of this information, AZD9668 has not been shown to have entered clinical trials.  

Note: This conclusion relies exclusively on explicit references present in the source; absence of naming implies lack of reported study history per stated criteria. External knowledge—such as actual development status—is excluded due to strict adherence to evidentiary bounds.
